data.body: 4214 patchset 7 PUSHED to existing change #664 (Change-Id I0866496f, updated not new). CI pre-flight all green locally (make lint/typecheck/test exit 0). Commit body documents Option B era-at-storage-anchor remediation + held-out rollback regression. Stale LLM-Review/Verified votes cleared; awaiting re-vote on PS7. Next: wait for LLM-Review+Verified, then close 4214 after Verified+1.
